reviews.comment:
De viaje a San Juan pasé una noche en su hostal (ACA) después fue una parada obligada en cada viaje. Gente sencilla. Muy amables

(Translated by Google)
On a trip to San Juan, I spent a night at their hostel (ACA), and after that it became a must-stop on every trip. Down-to-earth people. Very friendly.
